markdown.markdown:
**Does Algorithmic Risk Assessment Affect Physician Prescribing? Understanding Aggregate Versus Micro-Level Impacts (R&R at *American Journal of Preventive Medicine*)**  
with Emma Dean and Daniel Kaliski, 2024  
[SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=4728112)

**Pricing Protection: Credit Scores, Disaster Risk, and Home Insurance Affordability**  
with Joshua Blonz, Ben Keys, Philip Mulder, and Joakim Weill, 2024  
[SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=5026600)  
Media: [Bloomberg](https://news.bloomberglaw.com/esg/do-home-insurers-really-need-to-check-credit-mark-gongloff)

**California Wildfires, Property Damage, and Mortgage Repayment (R&R at *Journal of Political Economy Microeconomics*)**  
with Siddhartha Biswas and David Zink, 2023  
[Philadelphia Fed Working Paper](https://www.philadelphiafed.org/consumer-finance/mortgage-markets/california-wildfires-property-damage-and-mortgage-repayment)  
Media: [Bloomberg](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2025-01-15/california-s-insurance-crisis-la-fires-payouts-and-long-term-impact) [Bloomberg TV](https://iqmediacorp.com/ExternalIframeMedia/?mediaID=44d6c710-a92d-486e-9bbd-ceac88980b69&isRM=false) [WSJ](https://www.wsj.com/personal-finance/mortgages/los-angeles-fires-burned-homes-mortgage-payments-a5b7d5bb) [American Banker](https://asreport.americanbanker.com/news/rmbs-market-ready-to-cope-with-los-angeles-wildfires) [Yahoo News](https://www.yahoo.com/news/homeowners-devastated-wildfires-now-facing-104533615.html) [LA Times](https://www.latimes.com/wildfire-recovery/government-resources/story/calassist-mortgage-aid-disaster-survivors) [Digital Insurance](https://www.dig-in.com/news/regulator-starts-task-force-to-address-la-fire-smoke-claims) [Honolulu Civil Beat](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.civilbeat.org/2025/07/insurance-deadline-looms-two-weeks-maui-fire-victims/&source=gmail&ust=1753542862213000&usg=AOvVaw0nVk0759xjvRkJfQTm3qLU)

**Flood Risk Exposures and Mortgage-Backed Security Asset Performance and Risk Sharing**  
with Jacob Dice and David Rodziewicz, 2024  
[KC Fed Working Paper](https://www.kansascityfed.org/research/research-working-papers/flood-risk-exposures-and-mortgage-backed-security-asset-performance-and-risk-sharing/)

**Less is More Expensive: Bulk Buying and Cognitive Costs (R&R at *International Economic Review*)**  
with Christoph Bauner, 2025  
[Working Paper](/files/BulkBuyingCogCosts.pdf)  
Media: [Chicago Booth Review](https://review.chicagobooth.edu/economics/2020/article/why-low-income-families-miss-out-bulk-buying)



## Journal Publications

**Not Cashing In on Cashing Out: An Analysis of Low Cash-Out Refinance Rates**  
with Igor Livshits and Collin Wardius  
*Accepted at Real Estate Economics*, 2026  
[Journal](http://doi.org/10.1111/1540-6229.70031) [Working Paper](https://www.philadelphiafed.org/consumer-finance/consumer-credit/not-cashing-in-on-cashing-out-an-analysis-of-low-cash-out-refinance-rates)  
Media: [Philadelaphia Fed Research in Focus](https://www.philadelphiafed.org/consumer-finance/consumer-credit/revisiting-an-overlooked-strategy-for-reducing-interest-on-personal-debt)

**Using Administrative Data to Examine Telemedicine Usage Among Medicaid Beneficiaries During the Coronavirus Disease 2019 Pandemic**  
with Emma B Dean and Daniel Kaliski  
*Medical Care* 60(7), 488-495, 2022  
[Journal](https://journals.lww.com/lww-medicalcare/Citation/2022/07000/Using_Administrative_Data_to_Examine_Telemedicine.2.aspx)

**Amazon Without Borders Revisited: Impact of Online Sales Tax Collection on Shopping and Search**  
*Journal of Economics & Management Strategy* 31(1), 48-63, 2022  
[Journal](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/abs/10.1111/jems.12453) [Working Paper](/files/onlineShoppingAndSalesTax.pdf)

with John Orellana-Li  
*Federal Reserve Bank of Philadelphia Research Brief (2024)*

**Reproducibility in Management Science**  
with Miloš Fišar, Ben Greiner, Christoph Huber, Elena Katok, Ali I. Ozkes, and the Management Science Reproducibility Collaboration (member)
*Management Science*  
[Journal](https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03556)

**Credit Card Trends During the COVID-19 Pandemic**  
*Federal Reserve Bank of Philadelphia Supervisory Research Forum Spotlight (2021 Q4)*  
[Link](https://www.philadelphiafed.org/-/media/frbp/assets/Institutional/Banking/SURF/spotlights/2021/surf_2021_q4_spotlight.pdf)

**Is Credit Card Forbearance Worth It?**  
with Xudong An, Larry Cordell, Erik Dolson, and Nilim Roy  
*Federal Reserve Bank of Philadelphia SRC Research Brief (2021)*

## Resting Working Papers
**Made from Scratch: How SNAP Benefits Affect Lottery Sales**  
with Jason Sockin, 2021
